nasb.text: And when they had crucified Him, they divided up His garments among themselves by casting lots.

esv.text: And when they had crucified him, they divided his garments among them by casting lots.

cnv.text: 士兵把他釘了十字架，就抽籤分他的衣服，

ccb.text: 他们把耶稣钉在十字架上，还抽签分了祂的衣服，

csbs.text: 他们把耶稣钉上十字架以后，抽签分了他的衣服，
